mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role_menu SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu (role_id, menu_id) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{menuId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted = 0, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY menu_id ASC
